---
title: "Your Name"
about:
  template: jolla          # try: trestles, solana, marquee, broadside
  image: profile.jpg
  links: # Use bootstrap icons: https://icons.getbootstrap.com/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:you@example.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yourhandle
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/yourhandle
    - text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000
---

Welcome! I'm a [PhD student / postdoc / researcher] at **University ABC**,
working on *[your topic in one sentence]*.

You can find my full [CV](cv.qmd), a list of [publications](publications.qmd),
and occasional posts on my [blog](blog.qmd).
